The '''T-17''' was a powerful [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive generator]]. It was much larger than a [[T-14 hyperdrive generator/Legends|T-14 hyperdrive generator]], and [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Junk dealer/Legends|junk dealer]] [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] claimed it could move a small [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
